---
title: "\'Mother Carey and the Leaves (with apologies to the \'Water-babies\'.)"
---

## \'Mother Carey and the Leaves (with apologies to the \'Water-babies\'.)

**Author:** Mary Eliza Bramston
**Date:** 1888
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (February 1888) 190-2.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
